title: The Passionate Quest
writer: Marian Constance Blackton, E. Phillips Oppenheim
actors: May McAvoy, Willard Louis, Louise Fazenda
plot: Rosina Vonet, Philip Garth, and Matthew Garner, chafing against the narrow prejudices of Benjamin Stone, their guardian, determine to fulfill their ambitions in London: Rosina, a stage career; Philip, a career as a poet; and Matth...
